'''thayana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niacinamide|niacinamide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niacinamide|niacinamide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thayana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæyænæth|thæyænæth]] || [[word:thæyænæj|thæyænæj]] || [[word:thæyænæsh|thæyænæsh]] || [[word:thæyænæ|thæyænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayayanath|thayayanath]] || [[word:thayayanaj|thayayanaj]] || [[word:thayayanash|thayayanash]] || [[word:thayayana|thayayana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayanath|thayanath]] || [[word:thayanaj|thayanaj]] || [[word:thayanash|thayanash]] || [[word:thayana|thayana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayafnafth|thayafnafth]] || [[word:thayafnafj|thayafnafj]] || [[word:thayafnafsh|thayafnafsh]] || [[word:thayafnaf|thayafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thayanatha|thayanatha]] || [[word:thayanaja|thayanaja]] || [[word:thayanasha|thayanasha]] || [[word:thayanaka|thayanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thayanath|thayanath]] || [[word:thayanaj|thayanaj]] || [[word:thayanash|thayanash]] || [[word:thayana|thayana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thayanathal|thayanathal]] || [[word:thayanajal|thayanajal]] || [[word:thayanashal|thayanashal]] || [[word:thayanakal|thayanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thayanaathatha|thayanaathatha]] || [[word:thayanaajaja|thayanaajaja]] || [[word:thayanaashasha|thayanaashasha]] || [[word:thayanaaka|thayanaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thayanathan|thayanathan]] || [[word:thayanajan|thayanajan]] || [[word:thayanashan|thayanashan]] || [[word:thayanakan|thayanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thayanathaoro|thayanathaoro]] || [[word:thayanajaoro|thayanajaoro]] || [[word:thayanashaoro|thayanashaoro]] || [[word:thayanakaoro|thayanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
